name: Maxim Resources Inc.
summary: Maxim Resources Inc., a natural resource company, engages in acquiring, exploring, and developing oil and gas properties in Canada, the United Kingdom, and Morocco. It primarily has a reconnaissance contract on the Hassi Berkane block that covers an area of 5,116 square kilometers located in North East Morocco. The company was formerly known as EXP Resources Ltd. and changed its name to Maxim Resources Inc. in February 2003. Maxim Resources Inc. was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
